repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #48942 in place: rebase/refresh the contributor branch, keep deriveSessionTitle extracted, preserve explicit entry.label before transcript-derived titles, keep auto-populated origin.label behind firstUserMessage, clean up lint/test issues, rerun focused gateway tests plus pnpm check:changed, then request a fresh clean /review before any merge decision.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): preserve explicit session labels in derived titles
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs #48942 in place on JFWaskin's branch.
- Keeps explicit session labels ahead of transcript-derived heartbeat text.
- Keeps auto-populated origin labels behind firstUserMessage so inbound DMs can still show transcript summaries.
- Keeps deriveSessionTitle available through the session-utils compatibility re-export.

## Repair notes
- Address hydrated bot-review findings: Greptile zero-updatedAt test naming and Codex origin-label precedence.
- Resolve the branch's current check-lint/core-fast/extension-bundled failures only where caused by this focused gateway diff.
- Preserve @JFWaskin credit and source PR attribution: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48942.

## Verification
- pnpm test src/gateway/session-title.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Fresh Codex /review with no actionable findings before merge readiness is claimed.
credit_notes: Preserve JFWaskin as the contributor for #48942; repair the existing maintainer-editable branch rather than replacing it.
PR body or final verification should thank @JFWaskin and keep https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48942 as the source PR for attribution.
Do not include Android, dependency, metadata-stripping, or summary-derived-title work in this repair.
